descriptionShort: Centennial Cup all-star team selections announced, featuring three Humboldt players, two from Richmond, and one from Pembroke.
descriptionLong: The Centennial Cup all-star team was selected before semifinal play in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on May 10, 1987. Humboldt dominated the selection with centre Bill McDougall (tied for round-robin scoring lead with 7 points), defenceman Rob Rice, and right wing Duncan Ryhorchuk. Richmond contributed left wing Jason Phillips (second in scoring with 6 points) and defenceman Matt Hervey. Pembroke's Grant Robb was the sole goaltender named.
